synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0519 Moderate: Oracle Linux 8 postgresql:16 security update
description:
pgaudit
pg_repack
postgres-decoderbufs
postgresql
[16.11-1]
- Update to 16.11
- Resolves: RHEL-128820 (CVE-2025-12818)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0519

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0519.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:
